scripts.build:check: node ./scripts/prepare-udt-dist.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./dist/manifest.json','utf8'));console.log('✓ manifest valid');const files=fs.readdirSync('./dist/scripts',{recursive:true});console.log('✓ dist/scripts: '+files.length+' files')"
scripts.test:plugin-contract: node -e "console.log('Contract tests placeholder — run in Photoshop with UDT')"
